stories.title: German blog article — standalone SEO content
stories.description: Write a standalone German blog article targeting Turkish diaspora in Germany searching for blood test translation help. Own slug, no hreflang to TR article.
acceptance: 800+ words of natural German prose (not AI-translated feel)
Primary keyword in H1/title and 3-5 natural occurrences in body
FAQ section with H3s under H2 containing 'FAQ' or 'Haufige Fragen' — extractable by extractFaqFromContent()
Frontmatter: locale 'de', author 'Onur O.', tags, slug matching primary keyword

phases.A: SEO Research: /jnuo-seo (mode: research) for German keywords — 'Blutwerte verstehen Turkisch', 'Blutbild turkische Ubersetzung', 'Laborwerte Turkisch Deutschland', 'turkische Blutwerte Bedeutung'
phases.B: Write: /jnuo-seo (mode: content) — reference German healthcare (Hausarzt, Blutbild, Laborwerte, Krankenkasse). FAQ with H3s. Internal links to /login, /de/enabiz-anleitung.
phases.C: Content Review Loop: 4 parallel agents, 5-10 iterations until all PASS

stories.title: Dutch (nl) product localization — new locale
stories.description: Add Dutch (nl) as a new locale across the entire app. Translate all UI strings, configure routing, and ensure all pages render in Dutch.
acceptance: All locale files have identical key structure — no missing keys

stories.title: Dutch blog article — standalone SEO content
stories.description: Write a standalone Dutch blog article targeting Turkish diaspora in the Netherlands searching for blood test translation help. Own slug, no hreflang to TR article.
acceptance: 800+ words of natural Dutch prose (not AI-translated feel)
Primary keyword in H1/title and 3-5 natural occurrences in body
FAQ section with H3s under H2 containing 'FAQ' or 'Veelgestelde vragen' — extractable by extractFaqFromContent()
Frontmatter: locale 'nl', author 'Onur O.', tags, slug matching primary keyword

phases.A: SEO Research: /jnuo-seo (mode: research) for Dutch keywords — 'bloedwaarden begrijpen Turks', 'bloedonderzoek turkse vertaling', 'labwaarden Turks Nederlands', 'turkse bloedwaarden betekenis'
phases.B: Write: /jnuo-seo (mode: content) — reference Dutch healthcare (huisarts, bloedonderzoek, zorgverzekering). FAQ with H3s. Internal links to /login, /nl/enabiz-gids.
phases.C: Content Review Loop: 4 parallel agents, 5-10 iterations until all PASS
